quizzes.q: Where do the Low, Moderate, and High baselines live?
quizzes.why: The baselines live in 800-53B; 800-53 holds the controls themselves.

quizzes.q: Adjusting a baseline — scoping out, swapping, adding controls — is called?
quizzes.why: Adjusting a baseline — scoping, swapping, adding — is tailoring, approved by the authorizing official.
